title: Tom’s Pride
description: Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Franky, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam, Kokoro. Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.
